title: Added Advancements
description: More advancements to mess around with!
body:
Need more advancements to mess around with! Look no farther! With added advancements you get way more advancements. This was originally called advanced advancements but that mod already exists.

Advancements include:

1. ??? ?????
2. Does anyone even like this block?
3. Flying Brain
4. ?????? ????
5. Broken Gold
6. Black Stone
7. Deep Caves
8. I'm out!
9. ??
10. Otherside
11. Dripped out
12. Worksmith
13. Desolate Wasteland
14. Badlands
15. Creeper.. Aw Man
16. ???????? ????
17. Storage+
18. Storage++
19. Dimensional Storage
20. Cold Stuff
21. Cold Spikes
22. 1 in 15,300
23. AddedAdvancements
24. Strange Plants

INFO: As I start to roll out new versions for NeoForge, versions below 1.0.3 will not be available for NeoForge since I have lost the workspaces for the Forge version. Forge and NeoForge are the only available ones so far, but a Fabric version may be released in the future. As of 1.0.3, I will be saving the Workspaces for Fabric versions if they do come eventually.
